blockingIssues.description: Core loop never executes the implementer/reviewer runs. The code explicitly uses placeholders (impl_cost/review_cost/tokens set to zero) and does not call run_slop_code(), so expected implementer-then-reviewer checkpoint execution is missing.
Budget split is computed but not enforced in execution. _implementer_fraction is unused, and no per-phase budget allocation or tolerance check is applied to implementer/reviewer usage.
Reviewer output is not fed into the next implementer iteration. last_reviewer_suggestions is hard-reset to None each loop and no reviewer artifact is parsed or persisted for context injection.

Output is not eval-compatible for a real run. save_results() only writes two_agent_metrics.json, and no per-checkpoint run artifacts/snapshots are generated under an eval-ingestible layout despite the feature requirement.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Tests are mostly helper-level and do not exercise run_two_agent() or run_slop_code() end-to-end. This allowed placeholder behavior to pass despite unmet feature requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation contract and feature requirements conflict on budget-split=100 behavior, which can cause inconsistent implementations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:50-52 says --budget-split 100 should run implementer-only; feature expectedBehavior and implementation enforce 1-99 (features.json expectedBehavior, tests/runner/test_two_agent_runner.py:110).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The python-worker skill does not force an integration-level acceptance check tied to expectedBehavior, which let a scaffold-only implementation pass local tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/python-worker/SKILL.md requires tests, but commit 57fb8b0 leaves actual run invocation undone (handoff.whatWasLeftUndone) and tests contain no run_two_agent/run_slop_code coverage.

commands: python line-number extraction over commit files for cited references

summary: Review failed. The committed implementation provides CLI scaffolding and JSON serialization, but does not execute the two-agent checkpoint workflow, enforce budget split in execution, propagate reviewer feedback, or generate eval-compatible run artifacts as required.
